actors.text: GOF on the candy mix: chi-square = 12.4, df = 3, p = 0.006, alpha = 0.05. What is the conclusion?
Reject Ho: evidence the mix differs from claimed
Fail to reject Ho: mix matches the claim
actors.reflection: p = 0.006 < alpha = 0.05, so we REJECT Ho. Small p-value = strong evidence AGAINST the claimed distribution.

actors.text: Accept Ho: mix is exactly as claimed
actors.reflection: We never ACCEPT Ho. Even when failing to reject, we say 'insufficient evidence' -- and here we are rejecting anyway.

completion.rule: any correct QuestionDoor switch pressed by >= 1/3 of online players, then any Player walks onto Goal
